Bash(python -c "import httpx; import asyncio; async def test\(\): async with httpx.AsyncClient\(\) as client: resp = await client.get\('http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/mock/sales'\); print\(f'Status: {resp.status_code}'\); print\(f'Content-Type: {resp.headers.get\(\\"content-type\\"\)}'\); print\(f'Body preview: {resp.text[:200]}'\); asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)")
